name: Crock Pot Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pimientos.
2. Place rice in crockpot.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (except chicken and cheese) in a bowl and mix well.
4. Pour half of the mixture over the rice.
5. Place chicken on top.
6. Pour the remaining soup mixture over all.
7. Cook on high for 3 hours or until the chicken is tender.
8. Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese.
